hero.label: Made for Retell AI
hero.headline: I want to be Retell AI's first outbound experimenter.
hero.subheadline: Retell is building the voice AI infrastructure that's replacing human SDR teams at scale. The irony isn't lost on me: I built an automated BDR system with OpenClaw AI agents. I know exactly what your product does, because I've built something similar. Now I want to sell it.

whyCompany.title: I've deployed AI SDR agents — I understand your product from the inside.
whyCompany.body: On my own time, I built and deployed an automated outbound BDR system using OpenClaw AI agents. I've run into the real-world problems your customers face. That gives me credibility in technical conversations that most SDRs simply don't have.

whyCompany.title: Outbound experimentation is exactly what I want to do — not just execute.
whyCompany.body: Retell isn't hiring a standard BDR to follow a script. You want someone who can test creative prospecting approaches and find what works. At Copygen.ai, I had to invent the outreach playbook from nothing. That kind of experimentation mindset is how I naturally work.

whyCompany.title: 50M+ conversations per month — this is infrastructure at real scale.
whyCompany.body: Retell isn't a demo product. You're powering enterprise contact centers at genuine scale. Joining now, while the GTM team is still small, means every rep who joins has outsized impact on the trajectory. I want to be one of those people.

quote: I've built an AI BDR system myself. I understand what Retell does at a level most candidates don't — and I want to use that to build pipeline.
